title: Root Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Root reported record Q1 2025 results with an annualized ROE of 47%, generating net income of $36M, operating income of $41M and adjusted EBITDA of $57M. Gross premiums earned rose 8% and policies in force increased 9% year-over-year. Root's first-quarter gross premiums written were $389 million while gross premiums earned were $370 million, up 8% year-over-year. The company achieved strong profitability metrics in Q1 2025, marking continued success after achieving full-year 2024 profitability. Root's combined ratio and loss ratio metrics remained within target ranges. The partnership distribution channel continued strong growth, with partnerships representing an increasing share of new writings. Root's AI-powered pricing model continued to deliver improvements in risk selection and customer acquisition costs. Management emphasized the strength of the technology platform and data science capabilities. The company's capital position remained strong, supporting continued growth and investment in technology. CEO Alex Timm highlighted the company's technological prowess and ability to adapt to market conditions.
